---
title: Navigate decompiled DriveWorks assemblies
sidebarTitle: Decompiled assemblies
description: Maintainer workflow for using local decompiled SDK sources without publishing them to Mintlify.
type: how-to
audience: maintainer
---

Local decompiled assemblies are **authoring references** for maintainers and agents. Use them to confirm behavior; publish distilled pages here instead of copying decompile text.

<Steps>
## Start from a symptom or API name

Identify the product area (Rules, Applications UI, SOLIDWORKS capture, Specification Flow). Open the matching assembly decompile for your DriveWorks version baseline.

## Prefer focused search

Decompile files are huge. Search for the type or method name (`RuleSearchProcess`, `ICommandBarManager`, `ReleaseModelsTask`) rather than reading top to bottom.

## Map to shipping seams

| Question                      | Assemblies to search                                        |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| Rule parse/search/rename      | `DriveWorks.Engine`                                         |
| Administrator UI              | `DriveWorks.Applications`, `DriveWorks.Applications.Shared` |
| Rule language runtime         | `Titan.Rules`                                               |
| SOLIDWORKS capture/generation | `DriveWorks.SolidWorks`                                     |

## Write findings into Mintlify

Extract invariants, parameters, and one example into a single [concept](/driveworks/concepts) or [maintainer](/driveworks/plugins/maintain) page. Do not link readers to decompile paths.

<Check>Published page stands alone with DriveWorks product terms and no local file paths.</Check>
</Steps>

## Key entry types (22.x baseline)

| Area          | Types                                                      |
| ------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Host          | `IApplication`, `IGroupService`, `IProjectService`         |
| Project model | `Project`, `ProjectUtility`                                |
| Collections   | `ProjectVariables`, `ProjectConstants`, `ProjectDocuments` |
| Rules         | `RuleSearchProcess`, `RenameProcess`                       |
